zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg於1140年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格阿赤 維爾德沙奧森時，他的父親Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg15歲，母親Salome von Geldern-Zutphen15歲。他和Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund至少有4個兒子。他於1167年被列為graf von wildeshausen。他去世於1197年在澤西島享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg于1140年出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格阿赤 維爾德沙奧森时，他的父亲Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg15岁，母亲Salome von Geldern-Zutphen15岁。他和Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund至少有4个儿子。他于1167年被列为graf von wildeshausen。他去世于1197年在泽西岛享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg was born in 1140, in Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, Germany, his father, Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg, was 15 and his mother, Salome von Geldern-Zutphen, was 15. He had at least 4 sons with Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund. In 1167, at the age of 27, his occupation is listed as graf von wildeshausen. He died in 1197, in Jersey, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg est né en 1140, à Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Allemagne, son père, Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Salome von Geldern-Zutphen, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund. En 1167, à l’âge de 27 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est graf von wildeshausen. Il est décédé en 1197, à Jersey, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg 1140 in Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg 15 und seine Mutter Salome von Geldern-Zutphen 15. Er hatte mit Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund mindestens 4 Söhne. 1167, als er 27 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als graf von wildeshausen aufgeführt. Er starb 1197 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Jersey.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg è nato il nel 1140 nel Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Salome von Geldern-Zutphen, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund. Nel 1167, all'età di 27 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come graf von wildeshausen. Morì nel 1197, nel Jersey, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburgが1140年にドイツフレイスタアト オルデンブルグアムト ウィルデシャウセンで生まれた時，父Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburgは15歳，母Salome von Geldern-Zutphenは15歳であった。彼はBeatrix von Loccum Hallermundとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。1167年，27歳の時，職業はgraf von wildeshausenと記録されている。彼は1197年にジャージーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg(이)가 1140년 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그 아트 윌데쇼센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Salome von Geldern-Zutphen(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1167년, 27세의 나이로 그의 직업은 graf von wildeshausen이었다. 그는 1197년 저지에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg nasceu em 1140, em Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Salome von Geldern-Zutphen, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund. Em 1167, com 27 anos, sua profissão aparece como graf von wildeshausen. Ele faleceu em 1197, em Jérsei, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg родился в 1140 г. в местности амт уаилдешаусен, фристаат олденбург, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Salome von Geldern-Zutphen, 15. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund. В 1167 году, в возрасте 27 лет,  он работал по профессии graf von wildeshausen. Он умер в 1197 г. в местности Джерси в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg nació en 1140, en Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemania, su papá, Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Salome von Geldern-Zutphen, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund. En 1167, a la edad de 27 años, su ocupación registrada era graf von wildeshausen. Murió en 1197, en Jersey, a la edad de 57 años.
